# history

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: All conversations in historical order of creation.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `ConversationsView.View` "History" → `HistoryView`
  - Uses: `conversations.useConversations`, `conversations/conversation-ui/item.ConversationItem`, `conversations/conversations-view.ConversationsView`, `conversations/conversations-view.useGoneConversationsPagination`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.SidebarMenu`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.SidebarMenuButton`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.SidebarMenuItem`, `primitives/cursor-pagination.InfiniteScrollFooter`, `primitives/row-actions.RowActionButton`, `primitives/row-actions.RowActions`, `primitives/row-actions.rowActionsAnchor`
